expectations.text: Output contains an explicit rating on a defined scale
expectations.evidence: 'Strong Proceed' recommendation but no numeric scale. No structured rating system.

expectations.text: Strengths section with specific evidence from the resume
expectations.evidence: 5 strengths with specific evidence (50k tx/day, Spotify promotion speed, pipeline from scratch, open source library)

expectations.text: Gaps section distinguishing unknowns from red flags
expectations.evidence: Requirements match table has 'Unknown' for mentorship, but no distinct gaps section with unknown vs. concerning labels

expectations.text: Risks section addresses title/level concern and startup-to-midsize transition
expectations.evidence: 4 risks analyzed: Staff title legitimacy, title regression, startup-to-midsize, mentorship capability
Has proceed/no-proceed criteria in scorecard section, but not the structured conditional format ('fit if X, not fit if Y')
11 questions across 4 blocks, mostly behavioral ('Tell me about...', 'Walk me through...'). Each has 'listen for' guidance.

expectations.text: Includes a scoring rubric for the call
expectations.evidence: 7-dimension weighted scorecard with proceed criteria ('Architecture and Mentorship both 4+, no dimension is a 1')

expectations.text: Questions target identified gaps, not generic
expectations.evidence: Questions organized by gap area: architecture ownership, mentorship, motivation/transition, technical depth
